raw_consumer_statement:
Product : Credit card Company : Citibank , XXXX XXXX 
Card : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ________________________________________ What happened I did not request closure of my XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX account. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, Citibank closed the account, stating the reason was XXXX or more late or returned payments. That characterization is inaccurate. 
This is a business credit card, and I am not a personal guarantor on the account. 
In XX/XX/XXXX, my computer was compromised, requiring a business banking change. During that transition, I continued making payments. 
For example : A payment of {$10000.00} was initiated on XX/XX/XXXX The payment appears as paid on my XXXX statement Citibank posted it internally on XX/XX/XXXX Citibank treated the payment as late because the due date was the XXXX This reflects an ACH posting delay, not a failure to pay. Any timing issues were isolated to a short transition period and do not represent late payments over a 12 month period. 
________________________________________ Why this is a problem Citibank closed a business account without request based on an inaccurate and overstated characterization of payment history. 
I have been a XXXX member since XXXX, reflecting a long standing and stable business relationship, which makes the sudden account closure based on a short, isolated posting issue particularly disproportionate. 
As I am not a personal guarantor, any implication that this account reflects personal credit risk is inappropriate.
